claim_support.reason: The claim of 6.32% YoY revenue growth in Q3 2025 is contradicted by the cited evidence chunks which show Q3 2025 revenue of $15.95B and Q3 2024 revenue of $13.07B, implying ~22% YoY growth. The 6.32% figure corresponds to QoQ growth, making the YoY claim unsupported by the provided data.

numerical_accuracy.reason: Severe numerical error in Financial Analysis Paragraph 1: Revenue YoY growth is stated as 6.32%, but the provided revenue figures ($15,952M vs $13,072M) calculate to approximately 22.03%. The 6.32% figure accurately reflects QoQ growth ($15,952M vs $15,004M), indicating a mislabeling of the growth metric.

citation_precision.reason: Cited chunk IDs correctly map to the evidence blocks containing the raw data points (revenue, margins, employee counts). The errors lie in the interpretation/calculation of the data rather than the citation mapping itself.

temporal_validity.reason: All news dates (2025-09-15) and financial periods (Q3 2025 ended Aug 2025) are consistent with the report As-Of date of 2025-09-15. No post-as-of information is used.

consistency.reason: Material inconsistency in Company Overview: Paragraph 1 states 37,000 employees while Paragraph 2 states 19,000 employees, citing different profile chunks. Additionally, the Revenue Growth metric is inconsistently labeled (YoY vs QoQ) across the financial analysis.

financial_numeric.reason: Skipped because the report failed the Accuracy Gate due to severe unsupported claims, numerical errors, inconsistencies.
